creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
The panic seems reproducible.

I try to install Debian Wheezy in VirtualBox. The panic occurs as soon as I hit "Continue" on the HTTP proxy dialog (after choosing the package mirror). I'll investigate a bit and report back.

Some more informations:
    o  VirtualBox is 4.3.20_2 installed from a binary package
    o  Debian ISO is debian-7.7.0-amd64-netinst.iso
